spec.user: In the Rust crate at {project_root}, fix the event-driven state transition logic in src/main.rs so running the binary produces the correct status summary report.
spec.expected_output:
active: 0
closed: 2
pending: 1
suspended: 0
reopened: 1
invalid transitions: 3

steps.replace:
fn apply_event(state: Option<State>, event: Event) -> (Option<State>, bool) {
    match (state, event) {
        (None, Event::Create) => (Some(State::Active), true),
        (Some(State::Active), Event::Defer) => (Some(State::Pending), true),
        (Some(State::Pending), Event::Resume) => (Some(State::Active), true),
        (Some(State::Active), Event::Suspend) => (Some(State::Suspended), true),
        (Some(State::Suspended), Event::Resume) => (Some(State::Active), true),
        (Some(State::Active), Event::Resolve) => (Some(State::Closed), true),
        (Some(State::Pending), Event::Resolve) => (Some(State::Closed), true),
        (Some(State::Closed), Event::Reopen) => (Some(State::Reopened), true),
        (Some(State::Reopened), Event::Resolve) => (Some(State::Closed), true),
        (Some(State::Reopened), Event::Defer) => (Some(State::Pending), true),
        (Some(State::Reopened), Event::Suspend) => (Some(State::Suspended), true),
        (Some(State::Closed), Event::Resolve) => (Some(State::Closed), false),
        (current, _) => (current, false),
    }
}

spec.final: FINAL: Fixed state transition handling so invalid events preserve current state, closed tickets reopen into the reopened state, and reopened tickets support valid follow-up transitions. Running the crate now prints the expected summary.
